Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2096 0 0}C'mon, what're we waiting for? Let's do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2034 0 0}Look, man, I-I just wasn't at the top of my game![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}I mean, we all got our bad days, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}*snicker* Looks like Sanada-san's mojo's a no-go outside of school.[n]{f 1 1}
